Bash(python3 << 'PYSCRIPT'
import re

# Read the HTML file
with open\("C:/Users/Дмитрий/Desktop/Артур сайт/site_copy/index.html", "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Search for rec1894130191 section
rec_match = re.search\(r'id="rec1894130191"[^<]*<style>\([^<]*\)</style>', content, re.DOTALL\)
if rec_match:
    style_content = rec_match.group\(1\)
    
    # Extract styles for each element ID
    element_ids = [
        "1735133726721",  # SAVE THE DATE image
        "1735133273189",  # ДАНИИЛ image
        "1735133423381",  # & symbol image
        "1735133405827",  # ДАРЬЯ image
        "1735133528687"   # date image
    ]
    
    for elem_id in element_ids:
        print\(f"\\n{'='*80}"\)
        print\(f"Element ID: {elem_id}"\)
        print\('='*80\)
        
        # Find base element CSS
        pattern = f'#rec1894130191 .tn-elem\\\\[data-elem-id="{elem_id}"\\\\]{{\([^}}]*\)}}\(?!.*data-elem-id\)'
        match = re.search\(pattern, style_content\)
        if match:
            styles = match.group\(1\)
            print\(f"BASE STYLES:\\n{styles}\\n"\)
        
        # Find mobile responsive CSS \(max-width:1199px\)
        mobile_pattern = f'@media.*?max-width:1199px.*?#rec1894130191 .tn-elem\\\\[data-elem-id="{elem_id}"\\\\]{{\([^}}]*\)}}' 
        mobile_match = re.search\(mobile_pattern, style_content, re.DOTALL\)
        if mobile_match:
            mobile_styles = mobile_match.group\(1\)
            print\(f"MOBILE STYLES \(max-width:1199px\):\\n{mobile_styles}\\n"\)
    
    # Extract artboard settings
    print\(f"\\n{'='*80}"\)
    print\("ARTBOARD \(#rec1894130191\) SETTINGS"\)
    print\('='*80\)
    artboard_match = re.search\(r'#rec1894130191 .t396__artboard {\([^}]*\)}', style_content\)
    if artboard_match:
        print\(f"ARTBOARD:\\n{artboard_match.group\(1\)}\\n"\)
    
    filter_match = re.search\(r'#rec1894130191 .t396__filter {\([^}]*\)}', style_content\)
    if filter_match:
        print\(f"FILTER:\\n{filter_match.group\(1\)}\\n"\)
    
    carrier_match = re.search\(r'#rec1894130191 .t396__carrier{\([^}]*\)}\(?!@\)', style_content\)
    if carrier_match:
        print\(f"CARRIER:\\n{carrier_match.group\(1\)}\\n"\)

PYSCRIPT)

# Read and find the ДРЕСС-КОД section
with open\('C:/Users/Дмитрий/Desktop/Артур сайт/custom_site/index.html', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find цветовую палитру

Bash(python3 << 'PYTHON'
import re

# Read custom_site file
with open\("/c/Users/Дмитрий/Desktop/Артур сайт/custom_site/index_backup_broken.html", "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    custom = f.read\(\)

# Find position of rec1894130241
rec1894130241_pos = custom.find\('id="rec1894130241"'\)
print\(f"rec1894130241 starts at character position: {rec1894130241_pos}"\)

# Find circles \(elements with border-radius: 62px\)
circles = re.findall\(r'data-elem-id="\(\\d+\)"[^>]*border-radius:62px', custom\)
print\(f"\\nCircles \(border-radius 62px\) found in custom_site: {len\(circles\)}"\)
for circle in circles[:7]:  # First 7
    print\(f"  - {circle}"\)

# Check if rec1894130241 appears at beginning
if custom.find\("<html>"\) < rec1894130241_pos < custom.find\("</html>"\):
    body_pos = custom.find\("<body"\)
    if body_pos < rec1894130241_pos:
        # Count how many rec divs appear before rec1894130241
        rec_before = len\(re.findall\(r'id="rec189413[0-9]+', custom[:rec1894130241_pos]\)\)
        print\(f"\\nNumber of rec sections before rec1894130241: {rec_before}"\)

PYTHON)
